0: It'll cost you <Format(IntegerParameter(2),FF022C)/> <SheetEn(Item,3,IntegerParameter(1),2,1)/> for a pilot application. What'll it be?

1: Sorry, but I'm gonna need <Format(IntegerParameter(2),FF022C)/> <SheetEn(Item,3,IntegerParameter(1),2,1)/> from you before I can get you a pilot application. Best of luck out there!

2: I manage the mechs and issue pilot applications to initiative collaborators. What do you need?

3: Here you are, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. Submit this application at the start of a mech op, and if you're lucky, you'll be selected for deployment!

4: You already have a pilot application, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>! If you're ready to submit it, you can do so through your exotablet at the start of a mech op directive.

8: Travel to the ground support zone.

11: Ground supporters aid areas where mechs are deployed. You'll use specialized portable equipment to handle problems ill-suited to massive machinery.

12: Don't forget, any materials gathered from the operation are to be submitted to the field scanner. Walk up to one, and it'll handle the rest.

13: This is not a drill─a mech op is underway! If you'd like to offer ground support, I'll send you at once!

14: Travel to the ground support zone?

15: Eager, are we? Whenever the next mech op directive is issued, I'll be happy to send you.
